text.message: Blue I don’t see how you don’t go 6 5 11 your first settle

Not when you’re this ahead lol
I really don’t think I’m ahead of red
i mean blocking the sheep is good
This is exactly what I’m saying black
Rather than block 6 ore you’d rather solo me and leave red completely alone
If I had the chance. I would block 6

We all know you’re way ahead lol

I’m just trying to settle bruh
And I’m not taking road from you
